name: property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month tool
description: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month, inefficient tracking of maintenance requests causes delayed responses. We automate work order generation instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of maintenance requests leads to delayed responses.
